claim: For a 4096x1024 fp32 row-wise softmax on AMD Radeon RX 9070 XT gfx1201, one-block-per-row shared-memory reductions measured 7.958159x faster than the one-thread-per-row baseline using HIP-event timing only.
expected_profiler_signals: lower scalar loop work per thread
curation_note: timing-only: HIP-event timings and correctness passed, but rocprofiler/rocprof counters were not collected because rocprof, rocprofv3, rocminfo, and rocm-smi were unavailable in this Windows venv environment. Do not generalize beyond this shape, toolchain, and gfx1201 target.
